pdg_node.statement: () -> StateModelSpec — immutable snapshot of all initialized fields (covariance P, process noise Q, observation noise R, latent mean/variance, and RNG state)
pdg_node.informal_desc: Bootstraps the StateEstimator instance: allocates internal containers, sets default hyperparameters, and establishes the initial state model ready for predict/update cycles.

declaration.name: stateestimatorinit
declaration.type_signature: () -> StateModelSpec — immutable snapshot of all initialized fields (covariance P, process noise Q, observation noise R, latent mean/variance, and RNG state)
declaration.docstring: Bootstraps the StateEstimator instance: allocates internal containers, sets default hyperparameters, and establishes the initial state model ready for predict/update cycles.
declaration.conceptual_summary: ProbabilisticLatentSpaceInitializer. Allocates and freezes a complete probabilistic state representation by instantiating all parametric containers — covariance matrices, noise spectral density tensors, latent mean vector, and a seeded stochastic generator — into a self-consistent, immutable snapshot. The operation establishes the zero-time prior distribution over a latent continuous state space, ensuring all uncertainty quantification structures satisfy positive-semi-definiteness constraints before any recursive inference cycle begins. No observations are consumed; this is a pure structural bootstrap that defines the algebraic scaffolding upon which subsequent predict/update operators will act.. Applications: Robotics & SLAM: Initializing the prior belief distribution (pose covariance, map uncertainty) for an Extended Kalman Filter or particle filter before a mobile agent begins sensor-fusion-based simultaneous localization and mapping., Computational Neuroscience: Bootstrapping a Bayesian brain model's prior latent neural-state distribution — mean firing rate vector and inter-neuron covariance — before online electrophysiological observation streams are ingested for neural decoding., Structural Health Monitoring: Constructing the initial uncertainty model over hidden material-stress latent variables (with process noise seeded from thermal expansion coefficients) before strain-gauge telemetry enters a recursive damage-detection filter., Quantitative Ecology: Seeding a state-space population dynamics model with prior distributions over hidden sub-population counts and demographic noise tensors before longitudinal survey observations drive iterative inference over species abundance trajectories.
